name: Anjali
ai_summary: Anjali Gupta brings 10 years of Atlanta residency with a unique dual background in electronics engineering and early childhood education, giving her strong organizational skills and hands-on experience with infants through preschool. She demonstrates a calm, positive approach to classroom management and conflict resolution, is available part-time Monday-Friday within 5 miles of Dunwoody, and shows deep commitment to local community childcare standards.
